name: Gainsight API
what_it_does: REST API for Gainsight's enterprise customer success platform, enabling programmatic access to customer health scores, CTAs, playbooks, surveys, and timeline data.
use_cases: Sync customer health scores and account data with internal systems
Automate CTA creation and playbook triggers based on product signals
Pull CS team activity timelines into BI or data warehouses
Integrate customer success data with CRM and support platforms
not_for: Small businesses or startups without enterprise budgets
Non-CS use cases — this is purpose-built for customer success workflows
Teams needing a self-serve API without a sales relationship
best_when: You are a large enterprise with an existing Gainsight subscription and need to integrate CS data with internal tooling, data warehouses, or automation workflows.
avoid_when: You don't already use Gainsight or need a lightweight, self-serve CS tool — the API is only useful alongside the platform.

auth.notes: Gainsight API key passed as header; keys are generated per user in the admin console

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription only; API access included with Gainsight platform license
pricing.notes: Pricing is not public; requires contacting sales. API access is bundled with platform.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; varies by tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error codes with limited detail; enterprise support channel for debugging
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET operations are safe; write operations may create duplicates if retried without care
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise sales required before API access — no sandbox or trial
Documentation is fragmented and sometimes outdated
Rate limits not publicly documented — agents must implement conservative backoff
Data model complexity is high (CTAs, playbooks, health scores have many inter-dependencies)
API version stability is inconsistent; breaking changes have occurred without clear notice

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced, API key auth, SOC2 Type II certified, HIPAA BAA available
